data.title: In the past 90 days, only BERA, BGB and other 17 top 100 tokens outperformed BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinMarketCap market data shows that among the top 100 tokens by market value, only 17 tokens have increased more than BTC in the past 90 days, including BERA (+499%), IP (+81%), BGB (+78%), etc. BTC's performance during the same period was -15%.
It is understood that the Altcoin Season Index is a new function launched by CoinMarketCap to measure the popularity of altcoins. It counts how many tokens in the top 100 assets by market value have outperformed BTC in market performance. If the value is about 75, the market is more likely to be in the Altcoin Season, and if it is below 25, it is likely to be in the Bitcoin Season. Since February 27, the index has been below 25 for 12 consecutive days.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
EU Plans To Launch Digital Euro CBDC In October
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde has announced that the European Union intends to introduce the digital euro CBDC in October this year.

data.title: Japan Approves Reforms In Crypto Brokerage And Stablecoin Laws
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Japanese Cabinet has approved a proposal to reform laws related to cryptocurrency brokerage and stablecoins. As announced by the Financial Services Agency (FSA) of Japan, the government has sanctioned a Cabinet resolution to amend the Payment Services Act.

The new legislation will allow cryptocurrency companies to operate as 'intermediary businesses.' This change means that brokers will no longer need to apply for the same type of licenses required by crypto trading platforms and wallet operators. Additionally, the bill provides stablecoin issuers with greater flexibility regarding the types of assets that can back their tokens.

Historically, no crypto-related legal changes have been rejected by the Japanese Parliament after receiving Cabinet approval. Similarly, the Cabinet has never dismissed any legal change proposals concerning Japanese crypto regulations put forward by the FSA. The FSA holds a significant degree of authority in handling crypto regulatory matters in Japan.

data.title: DRB rose above 0.00019 USDT. Since its listing on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 228%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows: DRB rose above 0.00019 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.00019858 USDT, and is now quoted at 0.00018 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 141%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 228%, and the current market value is about 18 million US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Increases by 1.43% Near Historical High
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining difficulty has been adjusted at block height 887,040, with the adjustment occurring on March 9, 2025, at 23:58:46 UTC+8. The difficulty increased by 1.43% to reach 112.15 T, approaching its historical peak of 114.17 T. The average hash rate across the network over the past seven days is currently 794.85 EH/s.

data.title: BBVA To Offer Bitcoin And Ethereum Services In Spain
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 10, Spanish banking giant BBVA announced plans to provide Bitcoin and Ethereum trading and custody services in Spain. This move marks a significant step in integrating cryptocurrency services into traditional banking in the region.

data.title: Monad Testnet Achieves Significant Transaction Milestone
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Monad testnet has reached a significant milestone, with daily transactions surpassing 1.3 million and total transactions exceeding 237 million. In the past week, 2,351,328 new addresses have been added. The number of addresses with 1 to 5 transactions is approaching 5 million.

data.title: BitMart is about to launch DebtReliefBot(DRB)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch DebtReliefBot (DRB) at 15:00 (Eastern Time) on March 10, and the DRB/USDT trading pair will be opened.
DRB is a DebtReliefBot, and the DRB token is created by AI agents Bankr and Grok.

data.title: SAIGO launches the "Light Up SAIGO" event, minting Genesis character NFTs for free for a limited time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the SAIGO project is launching a limited-time free casting of the Genesis character NFT event to light up "SAIGO".
It is reported that SAIGO is a project that aggregates multi-chain data services and provides fast transaction functions. Its vision is to become the traffic entrance for on-chain transactions. The project claims that it will be completely driven by community governance, and the token economics will fully follow the "CZ token issuance crazy idea".
